response_text:
The aging report shows that the buckets of overdue invoices are:

| Label | Invoice Count | Total Balance |
| --- | --- | --- |
| current  | 7 | 144.239.40 |
| 0-30  | 5 | 144.255.60 |
| 31-60  | 5 | 111.310.20 |
| 61-90  | 2 | 95.472.00 |
| 90+  | 70 | 2,179,291.50 |

However, we can see that the buckets "current" and "0-30" do not indicate overdue invoices. The bucket "90+" indicates that there are 70 invoices with a total balance of $2,179,291.50.

Note that we are only showing the top 5 records out of the total of 89 invoices. The actual number of invoices in each bucket is as follows:
The top 5 buckets have a total of 89 invoices.
Out of the total 89 invoices, 5 invoices are in the "90+" bucket.

This tells us that 70% of the invoices are more than 90 days overdue, with a significant portion of the total balance ($2,179,291.50) in this category.
